result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  analyze              Analyze test failures from failed-tests.json.
  query flaky          Show flaky tests (pass rate below threshold).
  query history        Show history for a specific test.
  query performance    Show test performance by class.
  query runs           List recent test runs.
  query slowest        Show slowest tests.
  run                  Run tests with optional filter.
  run-parallel         Run tests in parallel across multiple Godot instances.
  track                Run tests multiple times to detect flakiness.

commands.payload:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  analyze              Analyze test failures from failed-tests.json.
  query flaky          Show flaky tests (pass rate below threshold).
  query history        Show history for a specific test.
  query performance    Show test performance by class.
  query runs           List recent test runs.
  query slowest        Show slowest tests.
  run                  Run tests with optional filter.
  run-parallel         Run tests in parallel across multiple Godot instances.
  track                Run tests multiple times to detect flakiness.

result.stdout:
Usage: analyze [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Analyze test failures from failed-tests.json.

Options:
  --summary            (Optional)
  --exceptions         (Optional)
  --logs <string?>     (Default: null)
  --show <int?>        (Default: null)
  --with-logs          (Optional)

commands.payload:

  --show <int?>        (Default: null)
  --with-logs          (Optional)

result.stdout:
Usage: query flaky [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Show flaky tests (pass rate below threshold).

Options:
  --threshold <double>     (Default: 0.9)
  --min-runs <int>         (Default: 2)
  --limit <int>            (Default: 50)

result.stdout:
Usage: run [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Run tests with optional filter.

Arguments:
  [0] <string?>

Options:
  --all                 (Optional)
  --display             (Optional)
  --rerun-failed        (Optional)
  --timeout <int>       (Default: 30000)
  --godot <string?>     (Default: null)
  --verbose             (Optional)
  --progress <bool>     (Default: true)
  --no-track            (Optional)

commands.payload:

result.stdout:
Usage: run-parallel [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Run tests in parallel across multiple Godot instances.

Arguments:
  [0] <string?>

Options:
  --workers <int>        (Default: 8)
  --godot <string?>      (Default: null)
  --timeout <int>        (Default: 600)
  --dry-run              (Optional)
  --no-track             (Optional)
  --stagger <double>     (Default: 0)

commands.payload:

Run tests in parallel across multiple Godot instances.

  --timeout <int>        (Default: 600)

  --stagger <double>     (Default: 0)

result.stdout:
Usage: track [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Run tests multiple times to detect flakiness.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>

Options:
  --runs <int>             (Default: 10)
  --threshold <double>     (Default: 0.95)
  --godot <string?>        (Default: null)
  --timeout <int>          (Default: 30000)
  --stop-on-fail           (Optional)
